title: LYMOOR 900 Pony Beads, 200 Letter Beads Jewelry, 60 Colorful Clay Bead, Kandi Bracelet Making Kit for Girls, 30 M Elastic Rope, Scissors Tweezers, DIY Crafts Necklace Make Party Gifts
features: 【Rich accessories】The bracelet bead set contains 900+pcs selected bracelet beads, (600 24 color pony beads + 200 letter beads+ clay beads+love beads+Star), 1 pair of scissors tweezers, 6 rolls of stretch yarn, you can make a variety of bracelets, necklaces, everything is ready

【High-quality materials】kandi pony bead set is made of high quality materials, clear, uniform and smooth, not only beautiful, but also comfortable and durable, suitable for long-term use on any skin type

【Perfect Gift】The DIY handmade process is full of emotional value, suitable as a gift for Christmas, birthdays, parties, concerts, family celebrations and various festivals, make your own friendship bracelets, convey blessings

【Unlimited Creativity】Not just bracelets, large quantities support more creativity, can also be used to make rings, earrings, necklaces, keychains, crochet beads, decorative hair, waist chains or other handicrafts

【Make your own bracelet】The jewelry bead set is suitable for adults and children, you can give full play to your imagination, complete beautiful bracelets in a cheerful atmosphere, and also train your practical skills
description: Product Description Finely polished to give it a glass-like texture One of the perfect gifts for daughters Beading tools + elastic rope, support free splicing bracelets, necklaces, key chains and other changeable shapes, stimulate children's hands-on ability and creativity
